commands.review_summary:
Adds a Swift display-time Markdown preprocessor in OpenClawKit chat rendering to convert eligible prose soft breaks to Markdown hard breaks, plus focused regression tests.

PR surface: Other +312. Total +312 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live current-main reproduction was run in this read-only review. The linked issue screenshots plus current source show assistant text reaching a Swift Markdown renderer without newline-specific hard-break handling, so the bug is source-reproducible with medium confidence.
commands.review_followup: - A maintainer should review the protected PR and choose the canonical implementation among the open fix candidates; no automated repair is needed from this review.
